summary: Completed testing of new Hallazgos de Auditoría fields (responsable, fecha_hallazgo, fecha_compromiso) and unified Seguimiento module with tabs. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: new fields in form, new columns in table, Seguimiento tabs working, KPIs functional, 'Sin fecha' badges displayed correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Create hallazgo with responsable, fecha_hallazgo, fecha_compromiso (200 OK)
Backend: Validation - fecha_compromiso cannot be before fecha_hallazgo (400 error)
Backend: Update hallazgo validates fecha_compromiso >= fecha_hallazgo
Backend: Create hallazgo without optional dates works
Backend: GET /api/hallazgos-auditoria/seguimiento returns list
Backend: GET /api/hallazgos-auditoria/seguimiento/resumen returns KPIs (total_pendientes, vencidas, criticas_7_dias, proximas_30_dias)
Backend: Seguimiento filter by responsable works
Backend: Seguimiento filter by tipo_fecha (con_fecha, sin_fecha) works
Backend: Seguimiento filter by filtro=vencidas works
Backend: Seguimiento filter by filtro=critico works
Backend: GET /api/seguimiento-riesgos (vulnerabilidades) returns list
Backend: GET /api/seguimiento-riesgos/resumen returns KPIs
Backend: GET /api/config/responsables returns list of responsables
Backend: GET /api/hallazgos-auditoria returns new fields in response
UI: Hallazgos table has 'Responsable' column
UI: Hallazgos table has 'F. Compromiso' column
UI: Hallazgos form has 'Responsable' searchable dropdown
UI: Hallazgos form has 'Fecha Hallazgo' calendar picker (default: today)
UI: Hallazgos form has 'Fecha Compromiso' calendar picker
UI: Seguimiento page has 'Vulnerabilidades' tab
UI: Seguimiento page has 'Hallazgos de Auditoría' tab
UI: Seguimiento KPIs visible (Vencidas, Próximos 7 días, Próximos 30 días, Total Pendientes)
UI: Hallazgos tab shows 'Sin fecha' badges for records without fecha_compromiso
UI: Create hallazgo with new fields works end-to-end
UI: New hallazgo appears in table with Responsable and F. Compromiso values
UI: View modal in Seguimiento shows hallazgo details correctly
seed_data_creation: Test hallazgo AUD-2026-185 created and deleted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 tested new Hallazgos fields (responsable, fecha_hallazgo, fecha_compromiso) and unified Seguimiento module. Key findings: (1) All existing hallazgos show 'Sin fecha' badge since they don't have fecha_compromiso set. (2) Vulnerabilidades tab shows 30 vencidas, Hallazgos tab shows 0 vencidas (all without dates). (3) The SearchableSelect component for responsable works with existing responsables from /api/config/responsables. (4) Date validation works correctly - fecha_compromiso must be >= fecha_hallazgo.
